full_insight.headline: PUMA SE convenes AGM per §121 AktG; minor governance cost of ₹2.7 Cr (engine estimate), negligible P&L impact
full_insight.core_mechanism: The announcement of PUMA SE's Annual General Meeting is a routine governance disclosure required by §121 AktG for Europe-wide dissemination. This action signals compliance with regulatory expectations but does not introduce any new governance risks or material changes to board structure or shareholder rights.
full_insight.profitability_connection: The direct financial impact is limited to compliance and administrative costs, totaling ₹2.7 Cr (engine estimate), with a 10.0 bps margin effect. There is no material revenue or valuation risk associated with this event.
full_insight.translation: PUMA SE is holding its annual shareholder meeting as required by law. This is standard practice, with only minor costs and no significant effect on profits or company value.
